Package org.odpi.openmetadata.frameworks.openmetadata.definitions

Interface InformationSupplyChainDefinition

All Superinterfaces:
ReferenceableDefinition
All Known Implementing Classes:
EgeriaInformationSupplyChainDefinition, InformationSupplyChain
public interface InformationSupplyChainDefinition extends ReferenceableDefinition
A description of the predefined information supply chains. There are two formats - one for templates and the other for normal information supply chains.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface org.odpi.openmetadata.frameworks.openmetadata.definitions.ReferenceableDefinition
